expectations.evidence: Commit message starts with 'refactor: update skill definitions and local settings' which follows the 'type: description' format.
Step 1 'Inspected git status' lists 3 changed files with staging status. Step 2 reviews recent commit history for style. Step 3 analyzes each file's content and nature of changes.

The commit message includes a body and footer: 'refactor: update skill definitions and local settings

Update accessibility-review and web-quality-audit SKILL.md files
and adjust local CLI permission settings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>'

suggestions: Without the skill, the agent defaults to a multi-line commit message with body and Co-Authored-By footer. The skill is needed to enforce subject-only messages.
eval_feedback.overall: Without skill: 2 of 3 assertions pass. The agent followed conventional commits and analyzed changes, but produced a multi-line commit message with body and Co-Authored-By footer instead of subject-only.
